steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly identifies these as “fictitious entries” — the key fact is that they're false, made-up things rather than real content.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: The entries were recognized as something false and invented. “Fabrications” directly denotes made-up falsehoods — the perfect match. The other three refer to studies, disclosures, or improvements — none describe something false. That matches choice C — C is correct.
